build.beforeBuildCommand: npm run build && npm --prefix chrome-extension ci && npm --prefix chrome-extension run build

security.csp: default-src 'self'; img-src 'self' data: asset: http://asset.localhost; font-src 'self' data:; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; script-src 'self'; connect-src 'self' ipc: http://ipc.localhost; object-src 'none'; base-uri 'self'; frame-src 'none'
